description:
AstroImageJ is launched. A time-series stack of 40 calibrated FITS images of the WASP-12 field is located in ~/AstroImages/time_series_stack/. Your task is to generate a Coefficient of Variation (CV) map to identify variable sources. Create an Average Intensity projection saved to ~/AstroImages/cv_output/average_map.fits and a Standard Deviation projection saved to ~/AstroImages/cv_output/std_map.fits. Use these to calculate a 32-bit float CV map (CV = Standard Deviation / Average Intensity) and save it to ~/AstroImages/cv_output/cv_map.fits. Record the global mean and maximum pixel values of the CV map in ~/AstroImages/cv_output/cv_statistics.txt using the format:
mean_cv: <value>
max_cv: <value>
